---
title: "PEX1/PEX6/PEX26 Complex Structure + Membrane"
---

## Interactive 3D Viewer

The viewer below shows the AlphaFold3 model of the PEX1/PEX6/PEX26 complex and
part of the peroxisome membrane as prepared with CHARMM-GUI. Use your mouse to
rotate, zoom, and explore the structure.

<iframe
  src="https://molstar.org/viewer/?snapshot-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ydinaii/complex_mol/refs/heads/main/mol-star_state.molx&snapshot-url-type=molx&hide-controls=1"
  width="100%"
  height="800px"
  style="border: none; border-radius: 4px;">
</iframe>
